initial_candidates.sql:
WITH first_terms AS (
  SELECT 
    lt.state,
    lt.id_bioguide,
    MIN(lt.term_start) AS first_term_start,
    l.gender
  FROM legislators_terms lt
  JOIN legislators l ON lt.id_bioguide = l.id_bioguide
  WHERE lt.term_type = 'sen' OR lt.term_type = 'rep'
  GROUP BY lt.state, lt.id_bioguide, l.gender
),
retention_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    ft.state,
    ft.gender,
    COUNT(*) AS retained_count
  FROM first_terms ft
  WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM legislators_terms lt2 
    WHERE lt2.id_bioguide = ft.id_bioguide 
      AND lt2.term_end >= DATE(ft.first_term_start, '+0 years', 'start of year', '+11 months', '+31 days') -- Dec 31 of year 0
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM legislators_terms lt2 
    WHERE lt2.id_bioguide = ft.id_bioguide 
      AND lt2.term_end >= DATE(ft.first_term_start, '+2 years', 'start of year', '+11 months', '+31 days') -- Dec 31 of year 2
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM legislators_terms lt2 
    WHERE lt2.id_bioguide = ft.id_bioguide 
      AND lt2.term_end >= DATE(ft.first_term_start, '+4 years', 'start of year', '+11 months', '+31 days') -- Dec 31 of year 4
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM legislators_terms lt2 
    WHERE lt2.id_bioguide = ft.id_bioguide 
      AND lt2.term_end >= DATE(ft.first_term_start, '+6 years', 'start of year', '+11 months', '+31 days') -- Dec 31 of year 6
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM legislators_terms lt2 
    WHERE lt2.id_bioguide = ft.id_bioguide 
      AND lt2.term_end >= DATE(ft.first_term_start, '+8 years', 'start of year', '+11 months', '+31 days') -- Dec 31 of year 8
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM legislators_terms lt2 
    WHERE lt2.id_bioguide = ft.id_bioguide 
      AND lt2.term_end >= DATE(ft.first_term_start, '+10 years', 'start of year', '+11 months', '+31 days') -- Dec 31 of year 10
  )
  GROUP BY ft.state, ft.gender
),
state_gender_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    state,
    gender,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count
  FROM first_terms
  GROUP BY state, gender
),
retention_rates AS (
  SELECT 
    rc.state,
    rc.gender,
    CAST(rc.retained_count AS REAL) / sgc.total_count AS retention_rate
  FROM retention_counts rc
  JOIN state_gender_counts sgc ON rc.state = sgc.state AND rc.gender = sgc.gender
),
valid_states AS (
  SELECT state
  FROM retention_rates
  WHERE gender = 'M' AND retention_rate > 0
  INTERSECT
  SELECT state
  FROM retention_rates
  WHERE gender = 'F' AND retention_rate > 0
)
SELECT DISTINCT state
FROM retention_rates
WHERE state IN (SELECT state FROM valid_states)
  AND gender IN ('M', 'F')
  AND retention_rate > 0
GROUP BY state
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT gender) = 2;

WITH first_terms AS (
  SELECT 
    lt.state,
    lt.id_bioguide,
    MIN(lt.term_start) AS first_term_start,

retention_counts AS (

  AND EXISTS (

  )
  AND EXISTS (

  AND EXISTS (

  )
  AND EXISTS (

  )
  AND EXISTS (

      AND lt2.term_end >= DATE(ft.first_term_start, '+10 years', 'start of year', '+11 months', '+31 days') -- Dec 31 of year 10

state_gender_counts AS (

retention_rates AS (

  FROM retention_counts rc

valid_states AS (
  SELECT state
  FROM retention_rates

  INTERSECT
  SELECT state
  FROM retention_rates
  WHERE gender = 'F' AND retention_rate > 0
)
SELECT DISTINCT state
FROM retention_rates
WHERE state IN (SELECT state FROM valid_states)
  AND gender IN ('M', 'F')
  AND retention_rate > 0
GROUP BY state
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT gender) = 2;
